"com.foodler.android.foodlerapp", "enabled": true, "bounds": [0, 280, 1440, 458], "pressed": "not_pressed", "scrollable-vertical": false}, {"text": "Looking for Afghan cuisine and delicious vegetarian options in the Russian Hill neighborhood? Look no further than Helmand Palace, where traditional recipes meet fresh ingredients and exotic spices to make an unforgettable dining experience that is sure to make your mouth water. Our enticing and aromatic menu includes a wide swath of dishes culled from the kitchens of Afghanistan and delivered straight to your door. If this is your first time dining with us we invite you to take some time exploring our menu or perhaps trying some recent favorites recommended by other diners, such as our Banjan, Afghani Salata, Qabelee, or our very highly praised Kaddo and Banjan Challow. Look no further than Helmand Palace, where traditional recipes meet fresh ingredients and exotic spices to make an unforgettable dining experience that is sure to make your mouth water. Our enticing and aromatic menu includes a wide swath of dishes culled from the kitchens of Afghanistan and delivered straight to your door. If this is your first time dining with us we invite you to take some time exploring our menu or perhaps trying some recent favorites recommended by other diners, such as our Banjan, Afghani Salata, Qabelee, or our very highly praised Kaddo and Banjan Challow. To top it all off, for your convenience, we offer delivery free!", "resource-id": "com.foodler.android.foodlerapp:id/rest_about_description", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView",
